product_name: Sophisticated Modern Micro-Home with Designer Deck & Braai
primary_description: Experience luxury minimalist living in this masterfully converted 6m High-Cube container home. Designed for the modern South African lifestyle, this unit perfectly balances rugged industrial durability with high-end architectural finishes. The interior features an open-plan studio layout with premium laminate flooring, LED lighting, and full thermal insulation for year-round comfort. The living space extends effortlessly onto a sprawling timber deck, headlined by a magnificent built-in masonry fireplace—perfect for entertaining against a scenic backdrop.
product_description: 6m High Cube container home with charcoal vertical-slat cladding, large black-framed aluminium folding/stacker doors, premium laminate floors, full thermal insulation, integrated electrical DB board and plumbing. Outdoor living headlined by an elevated timber deck with custom brick masonry braai/fireplace.
unit_features: Size: 6m HC (~14m²) | Deck: 12-18m² timber | Construction: Steel container shell with vertical timber/composite cladding in charcoal/midnight rust-proof finish | Doors: Black-framed aluminium folding/stacker | Insulation: Full-shell thermal (spray foam / specialised boards) with internal drywall | Outdoor: Elevated hardwood deck with integrated stairs and custom brick masonry braai/fireplace | Includes: Full electrical DB board, integrated plumbing, designer aluminium apertures
included_items: Steel container shell | Vertical timber/composite cladding | Black-framed aluminium folding doors | Premium laminate flooring | Full thermal insulation | LED lighting | Electrical DB board | Integrated plumbing | Elevated timber deck | Custom brick masonry braai/fireplace
optional_extras: Solar / off-grid kit | Greywater recycling | Bespoke interior cabinetry | Outdoor pergola extension | Roof-mounted skylights
excluded_items: Land | Major site preparation | Municipal connection fees | Transport | Base/foundation
